# Summary.

1. Referred  
   * [https://aiclicks.io/guides/ai-seo-success](https://aiclicks.io/guides/ai-seo-success) pdf \+ video  
   * Rokas Geo \- [https://wary-aquarius-f85.notion.site/The-AI-SEO-Guide-by-Rokas-Stan-27aa8f12987180e5916ec49e210d47e2](https://wary-aquarius-f85.notion.site/The-AI-SEO-Guide-by-Rokas-Stan-27aa8f12987180e5916ec49e210d47e2)  
   * Arib khan geo \- [https://foamy-meteor-71b.notion.site/GPT-5-Ranking-Playbook-24c826d726758032a6cdfcc7177b135e](https://foamy-meteor-71b.notion.site/GPT-5-Ranking-Playbook-24c826d726758032a6cdfcc7177b135e)  
2. **AI:** needs:  
   * **Consistent** brand mentions (Say your brand's name, UGCDrop, often)  
   * **Trusted** sources  
   * **Topic** relevance (Make sure it’s about the right topics)  
   * **Freshness** (information shoud be  new and up-to-date)  
3. **Choose 100-300 questions (prompts) where you want your brand to show up.**  
   * **Choose questions that already mention brand names most of the time.**   
     * (This is where people are looking for tools\!)  
     * **Examples of questions to choose:**  
       * "best ugc tools"  
       * "\[Competitor name\] alternatives"  
       * "\[Competitor name\] vs UGCdrop"  
       * "Best software for (X)"  
         * X means things like **creating ugc** or **making ugc**  
       * "How to..."  
         * **Make ugc**  
         * **Create ugc**  
         * **Automate ugc**  
   * **Don't pick simple questions like:**  
     * "What is ugc"  
4. **Figure out where the AI gets its answers.**  
   * Find out:  
     * Which website the AI is **mentioning** (citing).  
     * What kind of **Content format** it is (like a blog post, a list, or a video).  
       * Use same content STRUCTURE  
5. **Make new content on those websites.**  
   * AI likes places where people talk to each other:  
     * **Community sites** like **Reddit**, **review sites**, and **discussions**.  
     * Examples: **Reddit threads**, **LinkedIn posts**, **Facebook groups**, and **online forums** (like Quora).  
   * Create structured answers NOT long-form essays  
6. **MUST use Reddit. ([detailed](https://wary-aquarius-f85.notion.site/Step-4-How-to-Use-Reddit-to-Drive-Traffic-and-Sales-Inside-LLMs-284a8f1298718079a5e0c84baa797fb8) )**  
   * **Write replies like these:**  
     * "I tried another tool (X), but UGCdrop was honestly better because **it was faster** and **the quality stayed same**."  
     * "We tried a few options. (X) was okay for one thing, but UGCdrop worked better **because it connected easily with my 'claude'**  and **it gave results faster**."  
   * cta with brand name is enough with consistent brand, keyword mentions   
     * Llm dont rely on hyperlinks mostly  
   * Only these type of threads are important, not all  
     * People asking for Tool recommendations  
     * Comparison  
     * Alternative discussion  
     * Users describing their problem they trying to solve  
7. **Category must be the same everywhere.**  
   * When someone mentions UGCdrop, they should use the same word to describe it (show consistent category).  
     * Don't use different words, like:  
       * **LinkedIn** says it's for **automation**.  
       * A **Podcast** says it's a **marketing agency**.  
     * (Choose one word and stick with it\!)  
8. **Search for your tool's category using AI.**  
   * Search things like: **“ugc content creation”** or **“ugc video tools”**.  
     * See which brands the AI **mentions most often** (Find top mentions).  
   * **Write articles or posts about the best alternatives to those top brands.**  
     * Examples: **“Arcads alternatives”**, **“Arcads comparison”**, **“Comparing prices”**, and **“How to choose the best one”** (Pricing comparison, how to choose).  
   * **If you write a blog post, it needs to be easy for the AI to read (ai readable).**  
     * Make sure it has:  
       * The **main answer right away** (Direct answer immediately).  
       * A **table that summarizes everything** (Summary table).  
       * The **most important ideas** (Key takeaways).  
       * **More details to back up your points** (Supporting detail).  
       * **Answers to common questions** (FAQs).  
9. **TRUST \- Get people to write reviews and give ratings on Review websites.**  
   * The AI (LLM) checks these to see if your tool can be **trusted**.  
   * **Review websites:** Trustpilot, G2, Capterra, Google Reviews (Platforms).  
   * **Focus on reviews that are good and new** (quality \+ recent reviews).  
     * ❌ good tool  
     * ✅ helped us create ugc videos for our brand faster. Nice ui (It helped us make UGC videos for our company faster. The website design is nice.)  
   * **Make your website look trustworthy**  
     * **real founder photos, clear company information, and transparent pricing. Real linkedin profile links**  
     * If website looks anonymous ai wont show it  
10. **Use your old posts and blogs again on websites like Medium and Substack.**  
    * Look at other posts on those websites that are similar (Check similar posts in respective platforms).  
    * Use the same way they organize their writing (Copy the structure).  
    * Use your own content/blogs about UGCdrop (Use UGCdrop Content/ blogs).  
    * Linkedin Pulse articles  
11. **Make YouTube videos these are high leverage**  
    * Make videos that show:  
      * **Comparisons** (which is better).  
      * **Alternatives** (other choices).  
      * **Reviews** (what you think).  
      * **Tutorials** (how to use it).  
      * **Example Title:** “Best tool to mass produce UGC” (Best tool to make tons of UGC fast.)  
12. **Write comments on your competitors’ YouTube videos** (Engage in Youtube comments of competitors).  
13. Create a custom GPT inside Chat GPT   
    * "Best UGC Creator for Brands"   
      * a free GPT that helps ecommerce brands plan their UGC strategy, and naturally recommends ugcdrop as the tool to use![][image1]  
    * "UGC Caption Generator"  
      * something genuinely useful that gets used and shared, with ugcdrop baked into the recommendations  
14. Create Landing Page, use **Natural language** and direct answers  
    * trust badges (4.9/5 rating), and direct CTAs.   
    * Create structured answers NOT long-form essays

## How to write pages for AEO 

1. Use Question Based Subheadings  
   1. NOT. “UGC strategy”  
   2. Use. “What is UGC and how does it work?”  
   3. Tools to use \-\> Also Asked, Answer the Public  
   4. Eg. from also asked

![][image2]

2. Put Direct Answer (2 sentence max)   
   1. Next supporting bullet points  
   2. Then, Contextual details  
3. Define definitions, dont link to them  
   1. Eg. \-\> what does (UGC) mean on (instagram)  
      1. Ie what does (term) mean in (industry)  
4. Add  
   1. FAQ section  
   2. Q\&A   
   3. How To.  section  
   4. tool s \-\> [schema.org](http://schema.org), technicalSEO schema builder  
5. USE GPT  answer structure  
   1. “The main benefit of UGCdrop is ..”  
   2. “In (industry), (term) refers to..”  
      1. In Social Media, UGC refers to …  
6. Formats working for AEO  
   1. Stats \+ list  
      1. 87% marketers use UGC, here’s why  
         1. Easy to produce  
         2. Drives organic traffic  
         3. Reduces CAC  
7. Test if AEO is working  
   1. Ask LLM  
      1. According to web sources, what is the best way to \[make UGC videos\]?  
         1. \[task\]  
      2. Summarize key points about \[UGC\] from top sites  
      3. List pros and cons of \[UGC\] with real examples

## AIO optimization 

1. Use Modular blocks, NOT essays  
   1. TL;DR at top  
   2. Each heading should answer 1 Question  
   3. Call out \-\> “Try This”, Quote, Stats Box  
2. Direct and specific language. Not Vague  
   1. ✅ Tools like GPT and Gemini are already used in over 50% purchase workflows, forcing marketers to create structured citable content  
   2. ❌ ai is future, and marketers must adapt  
3. Write followup question for previous section  
   1. Helps ai cite you again  on followup questions by user  
4. Include Interactable elements  
   1. Tables, comparison block, timeline, video clips

Example.

**Page Title:** UGC for E-Commerce Brands

**\[TL;DR\]**

* UGC \= authentic creator content that drives trust and conversions  
* This guide helps e-com brands scale content without expensive production

**\[Section 1: Why UGC matters for e-com\]**

* Stat, story, insight

**\[Section 2: How to source high-converting UGC\]**

* List format with examples

**\[Section 3: UGC tactics for Shopify brands\]**

* Table or comparison chart

**\[CTA: Want help? Get custom UGC starting at $30.\]**

## Geo Optimization

1. Write in citation ready format  
   1. Eg. According to mckinsey, 76% of people….  
   2. Name authors and speakers , timestamps for credibility  
   3. H2/H3 Heirarchy  
   4. Use writing style of Wikipedia, Investopedia  
2. Use Hub and Spoke Model  
   1. 1 hub page \- ugc for e commerce brands  
   2. 5 \- 10 spoke pages  
      1. Tiktok ugc for shopify brands  
      2. Ugc vs influencer marketing  
      3. Ugc ad hooks  
   3. More pages around the topic \- llm thinks you are expert on it  
3. Recommended structure  
   1. Faq  
   2. How to  
   3. Article  
   4. Webpage  
   5. Author  
4. Don’t do this  
   1. Vague language  
   2. Relying on word count  
   3. Skipping attribution to source  
   4. Stuffing keyword without context  
   5. Writing essays

## Content strategy

1. Tools   
   1. ‘Also asked’  
   2. Semrush keyword tool  
   3. People also ask  
   4. Reddit quora  
2. Pre-empt follow up prompt of user and prepare next para  
3. Prioritise Depth in page   
   1. And use Hub and spoke for breadth  
4. Use Q\&A format sections  
5. Each engine has its format  
   1. Chat gpt \-\> structure faq, bullets,   
   2. Perplexity \-\> citation rich, academic  
   3. Claude \-\> summarized, natural human like  
   4. Gemini \-\> interactables \+ visuals

# Detailed Todos.

### **Highest ROI \- Create Pages**

These are the most important pages that make you money (your money pages). Build special pages just for these topics (dedicated pages).  
**Other Choices / Comparing Tools (Alternatives / Comparison)**

* Arcads alternatives  
* Veo3 alternatives  
* Trend.io alternatives  
* Insense alternatives  
* Minisocial alternatives  
* Best UGC creator platforms  
* Best UGC sourcing tools  
* Best UGC platforms for ecommerce brands  
* Best TikTok ad creative platforms  
* Fastest way to get UGC videos  
* Cheapest UGC content platforms

### **“People really want to find this information”, high intent**

* How to scale UGC ads (How to make a lot more UGC ads)  
* How brands source UGC fast (How companies find UGC quickly)  
* UGC for TikTok ads  
* UGC for Meta ads  
* UGC ads without creators (UGC ads that don't use people)  
* How to test ad creatives cheaply (How to check if ads work without spending a lot of money)

### **Own the category, category capture**

* UGC examples  
* UGC hooks (The best ways to grab attention)  
* UGC ad templates  
* TikTok ad hooks  
* High-converting UGC ads (Ads that get lots of people to buy things)

# Create Landing Pages 

Create landing pages for:

### **By platform**

* UGC for TikTok ads  
* UGC for Facebook ads  
* UGC for Instagram Reels  
* UGC for Shorts

### **By niche**

* UGC for skincare brands  
* UGC for fashion ecommerce  
* UGC for SaaS ads  
* UGC for supplements  
* UGC for dropshipping

### **By use case**

* UGC for creative testing  
* UGC for ad scaling  
* UGC for product launches  
* UGC for agencies
